directive: C4356 Lead: P5.1 cron (#338) + P5.2 R2 backup (#339) SHIPPED (commits 817babb + 6a3cb34). #323 re-closed (Vinted cleanup confirmed in HEAD for the 3rd time — Bolt feedback ack'd; task WILL stay done). Bolt → #364 admin campaign HTTP wrapper endpoints (unblocks cron-scheduled Apr 28 Vinted T&C + May 10 Den matek sends — DEADLINE Apr 27); then #344 UptimeRobot + Telegram, then #345 Hetzner threshold alerts + PM2 logrotate. Trace → #324 Vinted grep (quick, one pass) then #337 queue integration tests. Sage → mobile-nav search entry (desktop done C2289, mobile still missing) + continue cart/PDP polish backlog. Guard → #330 nginx hardening review (docs/migration/nginx/janicka-shop.conf). External blockers: #329 (domain purchase), #1 (R2 API token), #14 (GMC), #216 (GA4).

BOLT.notes: #338 P5.1 cron + #339 P5.2 R2 backup SHIPPED (817babb, 6a3cb34). #336 P4.2 verified complete C4354 (checkout/comgate/admin actions use fire-and-forget dispatchEmail). NEXT — #364 P5.1b admin campaign HTTP wrapper endpoints: expose POST handlers that curl-scheduled cron can hit (auth via shared secret header, e.g. X-Cron-Token checked against process.env.CRON_SECRET). Needed for (a) Vinted T&C campaign send Apr 28 17:00 CET (see CLAUDE.md C2788 brief — subjects A/B, preview text, body copy), (b) Den matek Den matek collection send May 10 (see Lead Research Cycle 2771 #51). Endpoints: POST /api/cron/campaigns/vinted-tc-send and POST /api/cron/campaigns/den-matek-send. Each looks up active subscriber segment, renders React Email template, dispatches via emailQueue (fire-and-forget), returns 202 with job count. DEADLINE Apr 27 so Apr 28 cron can fire. Then #344 P7.1 UptimeRobot /api/health + Telegram alerts (chat_id 8750673812, token in JARVIS DB 'telegram-bot'). Then #345 P7.2 Hetzner threshold alerts + PM2 logrotate. #348 runbook docs. #329 certbot + #341 Cloudflare LB both BLOCKED until bectly flips DNS. Ref: docs/migration/hetzner-all.md Phase 5–8.

blockers_external.334: Hetzner daemon must boot (partially depends on Bolt #335 env)

TRACE.notes: #324 Vinted removal regression + #327 Redis cache-aside verification + #351 cold-read audit — all unblocked. #334 P3.4 smoke test GATED on Hetzner daemon actually running; skip until Bolt confirms systemctl active. #347 P7.4 Lighthouse comparison: start Vercel baseline NOW (production URL), Hetzner side runs post-cutover. NEW e2e (write directly, no task IDs): (a) Playwright category switching on /products — prior bug: filter state leaked between categories via nuqs. Assert /products?category=saty → click Topy → filter chips reset + URL updates + no stale facets in API response. (b) E2E for customer portal C3709 (login, order history, profile edit, wishlist, returns request, GDPR export button). Routes in src/app/(shop)/ucet/. DO NOT touch migration code paths (nginx/pm2/env/redis/bullmq).

SAGE.notes: Cart free-shipping bar SHIPPED C4356 (1f95d7f — truck icon rendered, gradient fill, near-threshold highlight). Inline checkout trust badges also shipped per prior commit. NEXT: (a) Mobile-nav search entry — desktop header search landed C2289 (verified) but mobile-nav.tsx still missing the entry. Add search icon + command dialog trigger in mobile nav (same MiniSearch instance used by desktop). (b) Admin dashboard polish: /admin/dashboard density, order-status badge contrast, empty states. (c) PDP polish: price history sparkline, condition badge placement, sticky ATC on mobile. (d) Cart sold-item toast (reservation expiry UX). UI-only — DO NOT touch migration code paths (nginx/PM2/env/redis/bullmq).

GUARD.notes: UNBLOCKED C4345. Audit #330: review docs/migration/nginx/janicka-shop.conf (repo copy of /etc/nginx/sites-available/janicka-shop.conf on kryxon). Check: (1) security headers (HSTS pending SSL but scaffold ready, X-Frame-Options DENY, X-Content-Type-Options nosniff, Referrer-Policy strict-origin-when-cross-origin, CSP with frame-src comgate.eu per Comgate inline gate 504×679px spec, Permissions-Policy); (2) server_tokens off; (3) rate limiting on /api/auth + /api/dev-chat (limit_req_zone, e.g. 10r/s); (4) 20M body cap scoped to /api/uploadthing* only, default 1M elsewhere; (5) proxy header sanitization — strip incoming X-Forwarded-*, set trusted values server-side via real_ip_header; (6) TLS hardening checklist ready (TLS 1.2+ only, HSTS max-age=63072000 includeSubDomains preload, OCSP stapling, ssl_session_cache) for when certbot runs post-DNS-flip. Deliverable: findings list + concrete diff suggestions in docs/migration/nginx/nginx-hardening-review.md.

hard_rules: DO NOT re-add Vinted campaign (see NEVER_ADD_VINTED_CAMPAIGN.md).
NEVER push to remote without bectly's explicit request.
Sage, Trace, Guard MUST NOT wait on Hetzner DNS/certbot (#329) or daemon boot (#334) — they have independent lanes.
Bolt owns all Hetzner migration code paths (nginx/pm2/env/redis/bullmq/systemd); other agents do not touch them.
Bolt: if #335 BullMQ task.description spec ever seems missing, re-read the task row in jarvis.db — the spec IS there (C4346 cycle note was incorrect).
